task_description: Implement advanced error handling, retry policies, and observability (X-Ray tracing, CloudWatch alarms, structured logging) in the CDK stack following strict TDD approach. Write failing tests first, then implement minimal code to pass. Update ARCHITECTURE.md with error handling strategy and observability details.

verification.summary: 82 tests pass (15 new tests added), cdk synth succeeds. New tests verify actual retry parameters, catch block configurations, X-Ray tracing, and CloudWatch alarm properties in the synthesized template.
